title: Mounted Medium Trilogy (1×11×14 + 2×8×10)
description: Create your own gallery wall. Includes (1) 11×14 and (2) 8×10 mounted prints printed on high‑quality Fujifilm photo paper and mounted on a lightweight 1" thick durable mounting board with black trimmed edges. Ready to hang. Customizable. Available same day.
notes: Walmart style 3-piece set; price before taxes/fees/profits.
